narrative_beat: Brasao heraldico italiano com figuras renascentistas em afresco

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a large Italian heraldic family crest painted as a Renaissance fresco, with central aristocratic figures in crimson, ochre and gold Renaissance garments
subject.focal_point: a stylized letter A emblem at the top of the crest
subject.secondary: Silhouettes of vintage Ferrari and Fiat automobiles visible in monochrome background behind the fresco.
props: Renaissance garments in crimson and ochre

environment.location: an Italian palazzo wall with aged plaster

composition.foreground: fresco figures in vivid Renaissance palette — crimson, ochre, gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white vintage automobile silhouettes and palazzo architecture

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: old European money persisting through centuries
symbolism.secondary: family crest as coat of arms for corporate empire

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
